$comment: Brand-voice copy. Templ pages reference these keys via data-copy-slot=<key>. Keep entries: short, friendly, plain-prose, no imperative shouting (no all-caps), no em-dashes inside button labels. New keys: dot-namespaced by surface. PLAN.md §144.
home.title: Workspace
home.lede: Pick up where you left off, or jump to a step.
auth.login.title: Welcome back
auth.signup.title: Create your designer account
auth.signup.lede: Spin up a world. Bring your assets, ship in minutes.
play.auth.login.title: Sign in
play.auth.signup.title: Create account
play.maps.title: Pick a map
assets.title: Assets
assets.lede: Sprites, tiles, and audio. Each one becomes a building block for an entity.
assets.upload.title: Upload an asset
assets.upload.drop: Drop a PNG, WAV, OGG, or MP3 here, or browse.
assets.upload.kind-help: PNG defaults to Sprite. Override for tiles so the renderer treats them correctly.
assets.detail.title: Asset
entities.title: Entities
entities.lede: Compose components and behavior. Tiles, NPCs, items, triggers.
entities.detail.title: Entity
entities.components.title: Components
entities.components.lede: Plug-in modules: health, AI, inventory, audio. Each one adds runtime behavior.
entities.components.empty: No components attached. Add one to give the entity behavior.
entities.automations.title: Automations
entities.automations.lede: When something happens, do something. Pick a trigger; chain one or more actions.
entities.automations.empty: No automations yet. Pick a trigger below to start.
sockets.title: Edge sockets
sockets.lede: Project-wide tags that connect tiles in procedural maps. Assign sockets to a tile-kind entity in its detail editor.
tilegroups.title: Tile groups
tilegroups.lede: An N×M template the Mapmaker treats as a single brush stroke. Useful for doorways, fountains, decor patterns.
tilegroups.detail.title: Tile group
maps.title: Maps
maps.lede: The worlds players walk. Authored or procedurally generated.
mapmaker.tools.title: Tools
mapmaker.layers.title: Layers
mapmaker.palette.title: Palette
mapmaker.inspector.title: Inspector
mapmaker.inspector.empty: Click a tile to edit its per-cell overrides.
mapmaker.proc.title: Procedural
mapmaker.proc.help: Pick a seed, then Generate to preview. Lock the seed to keep it.
mapmaker.proc.transient: Transient map — regenerates from the seed every refresh window.
sandbox.title: Sandbox
sandbox.lede: Test any map against your latest drafts. Designer commands are unlocked: spawn entities, freeze the tick, take control.
sandbox.hud.title: SANDBOX
sandbox.hud.inspector.empty: Click an entity in the canvas to inspect it.
settings.title: Settings
settings.theme.title: Theme
settings.theme.lede: Console appearance. Designers can pick light or dark; we'll remember.
settings.font.title: Project font
settings.font.lede: In-game text uses this font. The console UI always uses DM Mono.
settings.font.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. 0123456789
settings.audio.title: Audio
settings.audio.master.label: Master
settings.audio.music.label: Music
settings.audio.sfx.label: SFX
settings.spectator.title: Spectator
settings.controls.title: Controls
settings.controls.lede: Click a binding, then press a key to rebind. Esc cancels.
settings.controls.empty: No commands registered yet — open the game view first.
settings.footnote: Settings save to your account; localStorage keeps an offline copy.
publish.preview.title: Push to Live
publish.preview.empty: Nothing to publish — every draft has already been pushed.
publish.preview.lede: Drafts ready for the next live cut.
shell.title: Welcome to Boxland
shell.lede: Your design console. Build with assets, entities, and maps; test in the sandbox; push to live.
$voice: Short. Friendly. Plain-prose. No all-caps. No em-dashes inside button labels. Verbs in titles when actionable. Help text adds context, not duplication.
